review_text:
We had a luvly stay. Thankyou so much! The caretakers were such a luvly couple and made our stay even better Thanks so much Michelle and Mark.

The rooms were clean. Was quiet and the sound of the ocean at night was Amazing.
Easy access to the beach and not to far away from activities qnd amentities.
Will definately be back

Stayed 4 nights in a 2 bedroom deluxe villa with 2 adults and 2 children. The villa was spacious enough for us, including making meals. The kitchen was well equipped.
Very short walk to the beach, the pool on-site was nice and there was a games room and putt putt. There were enough laundry facilities that we never had to wait for a machine.
Friendly service as well!
Yes, this is a short drive from Coffs and other activities, but we enjoyed the quiet location.

It's amazing, very clean bathrooms,  spacious caravan sites and so close to the beach ⛱️ 😀.
Booked for one night, decided to stay for 2 nights.
OMG simply the best !! Staff were fantastic, Amenities brand new & super clean. Sparkly Pool, Mini Golf and the Beach 👌👌👌right behind this beautiful property. Promise we will be back !!
Powered sites, amenities excellent.
Not good so far hopefully will improve. Site is really small and parked very close to another van even if travelling friends are further awayand the park is nearly empty
Close to Coffs Harbour. Great caravan park, facility’s are terrific. Beach is 100 meters away.

This caravan park is a gem! It had all the amenities needed. The place was well kept and clean. Very child friendly. The staff were lovely and so accommodating. We had great weather over the February/March period. Added bonus - great coffee van! Would love to come back again one day!

Prostředí i vše ostatní bylo super, dovolenou jsme si moc užili. Až na poslední den kdy jsme odjeli. Krátce po obědě mi odešla z účtu částka 50 AUD. Nevěděl jsem za co. Patral jsem z AI a zjistili jsme že částka byla dodatečně stržená tímto Holidey Park. Tak jsem se divil že toto vůbec jde. A samozřejmě jsem tam volal za co to je??
A paní z recepce mi řekla že to bylo za úklid nadstandart, ze tam po nás zůstal velký nepořádek 🫟.
Ale nikdo z nás si není vědom toho že by tam po nás zůstal nepořádek, a navíc velký ☹️
A toto mě upřímně moc zklamalo.
A vyděsilo mě ze jde dodatečně něco účtovat a přímo si to stáhnout z mého účtu.

Jestli to tak dělají u každého??
Schválně potom napište jestli to udělali ještě někomu.
Zajímá me to.😥
Beautiful park, wonderful and clean amenities and kids loved the pool area!!!!|Coffee van was there so that made my mornings and the pedal karts were super fun!

Schöner Campingplatz mit grossem Pool sehr nahe am Strand. Moderne und saubere Sanitäranlagen. Die Camp Kitchen ist für einen so grossen Campingplatz alt und etwas klein.
Den Abzug eines Sterns gibt es für die miserable Internetverbindung, die hilfreich wäre, da der Telefonempfang eher schwach ist.
we camped here. It was GORGEOUS

Pros- location access to beach! The unpowered sites are right next to the beach! Amenities are new and big, clean, well maintained, large showers with hot water and excellent water pressure. Coffee van in morning, vending machine at office, pool, playground, tennis court, bball court, mini golf. Plenty of shade and trees! Bird life magnificent - keep an ear out for black cockatoos as they fly over!!

Cons - a bit on the pricy side but you are paying for the amenities essentially. Beach is pretty dumpy so be cautious as not patrolled.

Would stay again

We really enjoyed our stay.|The van was ideal size for my family and great value for money. Beds were comfy, bathroom had basics we needed, loved sitting on balcony having family time.||The park had all the facilities needed to stay entertained and cook dinner. We appreciated the 4 bbq and 2 stove tops, plenty for everyone.||Great pool, great size, good to have  the warmer one, very clean. ||Great location to the beach and plenty of walking tracks around to go exploring. Easy drive up to Moonee market for essentials and dinner options.||We would stay here again if we come back to Coffs Coast.

We had a very disappointing experience with this caravan park! We had a shared booking with another couple, who had to pull out. Therefor their booking got transferred over to us. We received zero communication, confirmation emails, texts, etc. When I called regarding our credit (which was a large amount) we were told it expired after two weeks!! We were not informed about any of this and they more or less just said bad luck and moved on! I stay at at least 5 parks a year and have never dealt with anyone that runs their parks like this. Very disheartening and will never stay here now or recommend to anyone!

I would give ten stars if I could. My husband had a medical episode while staying there, and the staff were kind and compassionate , offering practical help before I even knew that I needed it. They made me feel safe when unexpectedly camping alone. Add to this the position just a short walk through vegetated dunes to a gorgeous beach, well maintained and lovely facilities and the other campers who were friendly and helpful and you have a great place to stay.
I have been here a couple of times now, cabins are clean and tidy. Amenities are great and the staff are helpful.
We camped for 2 nights, 70 m from the beach.  Can't fault the place!
Lovely and peaceful very clean and friendly and leafy

We loved our experience at Sapphire Beach Holiday Park.  We felt safe and secure so we could really relax.  The park surrounds were well kept and there were lots of birds.  The bathrooms were so clean and the water pressure and temperature of the showers was  10/10.  It is only a short walk to the beach and it's uncrowded.  The park is easy to find and not far from the main road, but you don't get traffic noise.  We were there during school holidays so there were lots of families, but kids were all well-behaved and quiet by 8 p.m.  We slept so well here!  |There are play areas and game rooms, etc for the kids, but we didn't check these out as we don't have kids.  (The pedal cars looked fun though.) The laundry facilities are great and there is a huge area for hanging out laundry.  The reception/office is well appointed and has drinks, ice cream and snacks.  It was easy to book and communicate.  We got a text message with the code to the entry gate and it was easy to come a go.

Well maintained park with beautiful clean and recently upgraded amenities block. Had a lovely welcome and would go back again without any hesitation. Pleased to be able to put grey water onto the grass. Plenty of washing machines and not overly priced.

We really enjoyed our stay here, right next to the ocean but still a reasonable distance to Coffs Harbour. We were lucky enough to have a site next to the ocean, but I did note some sites out the back (left as you enter)  which would be far less desirable. Sites were a generous size.

The beach was lovely swimming in at morning but however the cabin blinds are broken and the TVs that they have are very low quality and remotes barely work. However the stay was OK but could have been better.
Fantastic holiday park. Friendly staff and lot's to do.

Friendly and helpful Receptionist.
Beautiful beach and location.
Clean and well maintained cabin -- although a small shower.
Fabulous well kept gardens and green spaces  -- my personal favourite 😍

Only minus -- why should we have to do the dishes when paying $170 a night?! It's not an AirBnB.

This Caravan park has been here for many years.
We have not stayed here but it is right on a lovely beach. The cabins look comfortable and clean.
Love it here, it’s our second visit and we’re traveling from Perth. The beach is awesome & Coffs Harbour just down the road
Very  clean and tidy . Kind, helpful friendly staff.
Lovely place to stay. Friendly and helpful hosts, all amenities excellent, and a prime beach side location.
Stayed here a couple of nights in a caravan, facilities were amazing and well cared for.  Right next to the beach, what else could you ask for 🤩
Excellent excellent excellent
Beautiful.

Stayed for 2 nights on the way to Cairns, but planning on comming back for a week just to stay here.

Cost is fair

2 caravans

1 x van 17m , 2 adults $50 a night

1 x van 22m, 2 adults 3 children $100 per night.

Short walk to beach, lovely spot
Powered sites with water, grey water drainage

Kids activity's
Pet friendly

Quiet location

Found the staff, helpful and professional

Wifi included in price, found if good speed with all 5 of us on our devices at night streaming movie and you tube and games didn't find it slow at all

Short drive to everything in Coffs harbour.
Great park. Staff and facilities were excellent.

During our stay, there were two instances where our accommodations were threatened due to minor issues, which was concerning. The owner had a tendency to assert his authority and even lied to prevent my boyfriend from staying longer. To make matters worse, there were disturbances with domestic arguments and police involvement, making it difficult to get a restful night's sleep. We were falsely accused of being loud and obnoxious when it was actually the residents of the neighboring cabin who were causing disturbances. Lastly, I noted a security concern in the female bathroom. A hole in the mesh screen, which could pose a serious risk to safety and privacy. The layout of the men's bathroom was also problematic, as the shower area is located directly across from the reception office, again creating an uncomfortable feeling of being monitored while using the facilities. This design flaw negatively impacts the overall experience and undermines our expectations of privacy in a shared bathroom setting. The conditions of the bathroom were unsanitary, with stains on the doors and walls, which was disappointing given the price of the stay. Overall it was a very disappointing experience for the both of us.
Beautiful stay here,  park was very well maintained, bathroom and toilets very clean, staff and management where amazing thankyou, we will be back, we would highly recommend
Great little park new amenities, quiet and right on the beach Moonee Beach 2klm away for shops, pub & takeaways

Great one night stay in June. Amenities were fantastic, really great showers, clean and big.  Pool onsite isn’t heated so unfortunately couldn’t swim, but the beach was beautiful as was the water temp. Would stay again.
Clean bathroom, friendly & helpful staff, lovely location
Great caravan park. Amenities were spotless, dog friendly and staff were very helpful and friendly.
The staff were all friendly and great communication the location is perfect the rooms were fine a bit out dated to my liking but it was fine defiantly be back
No safe swimming or fishing
Great beach access (doggy friendly), quiet park with plenty of amenities, fabulous pool and new clean bathrooms.
I stayed here with a campervan. 55$ pn, 2 persons with power,  off season. Very clean and modern amenities. Friendly staff, just 100 meters from a beautiful beach. Trees, birds all around.

I booked a cabin and had to cancel three days out as my wife was required to have surgery unexpectedly. They would not give us a refund or even a credit, saying it is against their policy to do so.|Considering I advised them within hours of being informed of my wife's operation It think this is pretty mean. Every other accommodation provider for our trip cheerfully cancelled our reservations on a no cost  basis. Very poor show given that we had no choice.
We are staying at Sapphire Beach Holiday Park for 2 weeks.  The caravan sites are big and we have a cement slab.  We are also  next to beach.  Good amenity block.  Our hosts are excellent.

We stayed at this Caravan Park for four nights, just after Cyclone Alfred.
The beach and Marine Park were pretty smashed up. The sand was covered in kelp, eroded and basically a mess.
Not a CP issue, it just detracted from the idyllic location.
There are some amazing coastal walks from this location, across headlands and bushland.
Aside - this CP has an incredible pool area. It is oddly out of place amongst the rest of the CP. Two glorious pools, loads of deck area and lounge chairs. OMG. Heaven. Well done.
The park itself is just strange, It is essentially divided into three parts, creek (stinky, mosquito), beach (sort of) and backyard area.
Well kept grounds, excellent  new facilities, if not a bit peculiar on entry (women’s toilet door is ramshackle to say the least.)
Great laundry.
Staff are extremely robotic. We had initial phone conversations, all of which lacked a heartbeat or even a smile (virtually).
We were going on the 4.4 Google star rating……
Come on guys - the admin team really  need to step it up a lot!  A smile, a joke, a friendly remark; at least.
On arrival, after choosing a different site to the one booked in an almost empty park we were chastised for possibly parking our Ute too far across a gravel road (barely, we were still front wheels on the grass).
There was a distinct lack of friendliness.
What disappointed us the most was the noise!
The family of on-site management was incredibly noisy each morning. To top this off was the construction that occurred for two days of our stay! No notice provided. Horribly noisy and dusty.
We loved the location. There were just a few disappointing and odd occurrences for us. We’d suggest a 3 out of 5. Perhaps poor timing.
We wish we had of played mini putt putt. 4 bucks each would have been fun.

As young travellers in a campervan:
Stars for the great location at the beach
for the clean and very good amenities (toilets, shower, laundry)

Wifi was bad in our camping spot and the kitchen area.
Couldn't even make a video call.
Staff didn't look realy interested after telling them.

Great spot right on the beach where you can hear the waves at night. Facilities were top notch and we had a great time here. The beach for young kids at the front can be a bit iffy but only a short drive to many other good options. Highly recommend
How rude, if you want to feel watch lorded over and attacked come visit this lot
Camping next to the beach (not patrolled) with great amenities.

This caravan park is the best the staff are super nice amenities are wonderful beach is so nice as well I recommend this place to everyone real nice atmosphere birds everywhere chirping so close to the beach 👍👌
Great Place, clean facilities.
This is my favourite place. Would definitely go back.
Not amazing, accommodation needs refresh. Location is good but that’s about all.

We were put in a site that really didn't fit the van and car very disappointed
The camp kitchen is in need of an upgrade Amenities (ladies toilets) were fantastic

after traveling all day we found this site.
called and booked everything was amazing
set up the caravan , got our 2 furbabies sorted and just sat down to relax when the park asks us to move our van to the next one over because someone has called and booked for 4 nights and we are only staying for 1 , makes no sense at all you gave us a number site and we set up there it is not my problem you would like to give that to someone staying longer. (its just a powered van site) so we had to up everything also broke multiple things in our van packing up in a rush (as he said if you have a problem come get s refund and leave. disgusting hospitality and service .

Lovely quiet spot a great place  to unwind it  had a good vibe. amenities  were excellent and up to date, the shower pressure was also excellent, laundry very neat machines were $4 a load all facilities nice and clean.|Loved the beach, just short walk away felt like a private beach and absolutely gorgeous

This is a beautiful caravan park with brilliant facilities.  We were unfortunate enough to arrive on a weekend of storms.  We set up on a flat, easily accessible site in the dark and the rain, and spent the first night hoping the canvas would hold.  The next morning, it was still raining, however, the campsite was well drained, with very little standing water.  It was also super protected from the worst of the storm - when I walked down onto the beach, the strength of the wind was phenomenal, but back on the campsite, it was relatively calm.  When we realised the rain was not going to stop, the staff went out of their way to find us a cabin, so the kids and I could stay dry.  My partner stayed on the campsite with the dog.  Dogs are not allowed in cabins, but the staff offered to let us have him stay in the car nearby if the weather got too bad.  We opted to keep the campsite, as the dog was likely to bark incessantly, even if we were nearby, and I didn't want to be THAT family that everyone hates.  ||The grounds are idyllic - they're shaded from the worst of the heat and beautifully maintained.  We didn't get to use the pool, but it looked amazing, as did the BBQ area, mini golf and kids' play area.  The amenities were clean and modern.  While we were there, there was a minor maintenance issue with the women's bathroom door.  It was fixed within minutes of reporting it.  ||Communication with the park was also amazing.  We were given all the relevant information well in advance, and were kept informed of any issues around the park.  Staff were kind, empathetic, and knowledgeable.  ||If there was the option to give more than a 5 star rating, I absolutely would. Can't wait to come back again.

We had an amazing 2-night stay at Sapphire Beach Caravan Park! The powered campsite was perfect, offering everything we needed for a comfortable and enjoyable getaway. The highlights were definitely the two beautiful pools, which were a hit with our family. Our kids loved spending time at the playground and playing putt-putt golf – great for keeping them entertained.||The communal shower block was a pleasant surprise; recently renovated and truly second to none. It was spotless, modern, and exceeded our expectations. We can't recommend this caravan park enough – a wonderful spot for families!

I stayed on one of the powered sites here and had a fantastic stay! I was sleeping in a swag and was never woken by any noise, it's very peaceful.
The beach access is fantastic and the 2 pools are lovely as well. The bathrooms are possibly the best I've ever used in a caravan park, very clean and modern, they've done a great job in the remodel.
A lot for kids to do with the pools, ocean, games room and mini golf. The kitchen area has great facilities and is quite spacious, 3 or 4 families could use it at once without much issue.
I'm keen to stay again next time I visit Coffs Harbour.
The staff were great too, the lady in the office was very helpful and I had a fun chat with the cleaner.
Highly recommended!
It was really fun with my kid they had lots of fun 😁
Solo pasamos una noche
Awesome ammenities. Right on the beach.
What a gem of a place. Booked for three nights, stayed three weeks. Safe relaxed and very well maintained park on the beach. Great value. Beyond friendly and helpful staff. 👍

We enjoyed this park because it was a quiet, peaceful & relaxed environment. We had powered slab caravan site just standard sizes. Slab & grass sites available. Very clean amenities, plenty of laundry facilities, great camp kitchen. Short walk onto beach. Would have stayed longer but our site was booked. Highly recommend.

Quality secluded cabins if you book the lagoon cabins in the off season. Short walk to the beach.
Whale watching from the beach was a bonus.
Loved this place

Great Place
New amenities 👌
Close to beach 🏖️
Pet Friendly 🐕
Great venue 100 metres from the beach. A great camp kitchen, pool area and plenty of entertainment for kids. Cabins are clean, comfy and well appointed. Staff are great. Highly recommend for groups

When we were travelling with Sumo Vita, raising awareness for sustainable travel.
The park is awesome. Modern showers, toilets and laundry facilities that were spotless. A large camp kitchen with plenty of space.
The site was situated on the beach with only a 20m walk to the lapping waves.
Plenty of powered sites and a great natural bush setting.
The camping areas are dog friendly during off peak times.
Sumovita.au
Tavel sustainably
Perfect place to stay and lovely hosts. Great location on the beach and nice and quiet.

Very nice and well-kept complex. Excellent amenities, great pool, beautiful mini golf course and right on the beach. What more could you want? We had a great short stay at this campground. The only criticism is that you have to pay extra for everything. We can understand mini golf. But for table tennis, basketball, etc. you have to pay extra. Money. We have never experienced this before on our 2-month trip.

Apart from that, we can more than recommend the camp.

The cabin had an unpleasant smell, which made me uneasy, and the overall atmosphere felt scary. Even now the thought of that horrid smell makes me sick. Unfortunately, cleanliness was lacking, evident from finding chunks of hair on the bunk beds. Although I requested a refund within an hour of checking in, it was declined. Even though it was overnight stay with two young children, the stench and the eerie vibe, we opted to check out straight away. We found a last-minute stay at Cove, which offered better accommodations at a lower price even as a last minute booking direct at the reception. While the Cove provided a safe and clean room, I was surprised by the trailer park's high rating. I would advise against staying there, especially considering the price. Even the nearby beach felt scary and unpleasent. However, I would like to thank the old gentlemen that took us to our room he was very welcoming and friendly.

My husband & I arrived after closing hours but the staff were super friendly! & so helpful - (with us being new to the motor home travelling). Facilities are fantastic & spotless toilets, showers & Camp kitchen, with BBQ sink & tables. Right next to the beach & so quiet. Will Definitely be returning here! Thank you guys- great value

The cabin was just for a night thankfully. Nice management but whoever does the cleaning… or doesn’t do the cleaning… gets a thumbs down. It was also very awkward and difficult to close the blinds on the other side of the triple bunks
(very little room to squeeze in - and I’m pretty flexible..!) I’m sure the people in the cabin didn’t fancy seeing me walking out the bathroom Which was in full view between the bunks. The screen door also came off its rails when I opened it and the driveway down to the park is in such poor condition, it’s a wonder I didn’t crack my car’s chassis. The park is nothing special either, but it’s right near the beach. And that’s about the only thing it has going for it.

Great service started with phoning to book a site.  The lady was very helpful and booking a breeze.  Then arrival was just as good.  The lady who we later found out was the caretaker told us about the area and facilities offered.  Site was large and the park was very clean and well kept.  The ammenities were also very clean.  Park is dog friendly and the beach only a short stroll  and is also dog friendly.  A cafe is nearby and Coffs a short drive or Moonee Markets also a short distance to drive for your groceries if needed.  Highly recommend.
TV reception was ok but even better when lent and Ariel cable for tv in van.  The pool and mini putt putt looked inviting and would be a great place for kids.
Will definitely booked again when down that way. Thank you for the lend of the chair as well.

The park is amazing!!! Perfect location for a nice camping site. We’ve been for only a night but we are going back for sure! I didn’t get the name of the person at the reception but I wanna thank the lady there as she was so helpful and friendly. The amenities were spot clean and very well maintained. The beach is super close and beautiful, plus is a dog friendly beach which our puppy absolutely loved it.

This was an extremely dirty cabin. The cabin was very mouldy. The air-conditioner was mouldy and all the vents were mouldy. There were sand in the beds and dirty towels placed on the beds. We also went for a swim in the pool and the scum had not been cleaned off the edge of the pool, since who knows when, and it was full mouldy. The chairs were mouldy and the showers, the outdoor showers near the pool. People must be peeing in the shower and the concrete, never cleaned and all it smelt like was a urinal, the most disgusting place I’ve ever stayed.

An overpriced dump, if I could give a negative star rating I would. It was nothing like the pictures online; it was old, dirty, the WiFi didn't work, the bed looked like it had come from an op shop, the "bungalow" reminded me more of a small shipping container. We checked out and left a message asking for a refund as the office closed shortly after we arrived. The manager (Joel) called me the next morning and got stuck into me. I have never received such unprofessional service and would never go back.

For an extra $20-$30 a night I'd suggest Opal Cove or Pacific Bay, which are about a 10min drive towards Coffs Harbour. They're both beautiful resorts, better locations, the staff are brilliant, the grounds are amazing - definitely worth paying the extra and you don't have to deal with opportunistic amateurs.

The caravan park is located in a beautiful spot just a two minute walk to one of the most beautiful beaches I have seen on my travels along the coast.
When I called to finalise my booking the gentleman I spoke to was nice and put me in a spot close to the toilet block which is appreciated being a solo female traveller.
The park wasn’t to bad, they had a games room, basketball court, the pool looked really nice and there was a mini golf which I believe you have to pay for which I think is a bit rich when your paying to stay at the park.
I arrived late at night after a six hour drive. I managed to find my site no problem. Then I went to the bathroom and needed a code to get in. You get a A5 sheet with codes and wifi details and a rules page on the back of the map. I read the rules but didn’t notice in the top corner the code for the toilets as I was to busy reading the rules. Being so late at night because I didn’t see the code or expect it to be on the rules page I couldn’t get into the toilet block at all. I couldn’t have a shower and I couldn’t use the toilet. I woke up in the middle of the night and had to go to the toilet on the grass, extremely uncomfortable and embarrassing.
The number I called on the A5 slip advises to call anytime so I did and no answer. I had to leave a message and I advised of my disappointment.
Can I make a suggestion that you put the toilets code on the A5 slip with all the other codes and wifi password, that would make more sense and be more visible for guests to see.
I advised Reception in the morning and there was two gentleman there. One of them looked at me like I was an idiot pointing out to me where it was.
I then advised that when I went to the bathroom in the morning I managed to get in because the cleaning lady was there.
That’s my next disappointment. The cleaner was playing 9-5 by Dolly Parton full blast in the toilet and after just waking up it completely rattled me plus I’m on holidays and I’m not working 9-5! She was running around like she was on something and it was overbearing first thing in the morning.
I advised reception just to make them aware and maybe say something to her. I got an extremely arrogant response from one of the guys that “I should have told her to turn it down”. No as a paying guest I should not have to do that, I’m not her boss and it is your job to tell your cleaner to tone it down for the comfortability of your guests. The response made me very upset as I don’t like conflict. The other guy did say he will talk to her. That’s all that should have been said in the first place. The way the first guy spoke to me was a shock and I am basing my 3 stars on his terrible customer service.
I took my time packing up and having a shower due to the disappointment the night before. I could see him standing out the front of reception checking on me and waiting for me to leave.
I was going to stay another night so I could enjoy the beautiful beach but the customer service and communication regarding the code had me not wanting to go back there again. Such a shame.

What a lovely spot! Lovely clean & new amenities.  Great camp kitchen with plenty of BBQs & gas hotplates to cook on.  We had a concrete slab site which was generous in size.  Only a short stroll & you're on the most beautiful beach.  Will stay again 😊
Very nice powered site. Short walk to the beach.
Really nice place. Staff super friendly. Helped us out, when our key broke off and saved our whole trip. If you are in the area looking for a place to stay, this is the one!!

This place is a hidden gem. You can tell the people who own and run this place really care. The pool and amenities have all been recently renovated, and you can see where their vision is going.
They are really nice to talk with. Making time to walk around the park and just have a chat with their guests.
You litrally walk out of the park onto a beautiful beach that you honestly wouldn't even know was there. I wish i had taken photos, but I have seen some other reviews with photos, so mine aren't really needed.
If someone told me they were planning a trip to coffs, i wouldn't be able to recommend this place enough.
Great place to stay amenities are awesome staff are more than happy to help fantastic pool and direct beach access.
Top place to stay, great pool area and easy access to beach.

HIDDEN GEM The sort of park you don't want to tell anyone about because you'll all go there. Nestled in amongst towering trees, meters from a stunning beach, manicured lawns, pool and impressive games room. Sites are big and spread out. Owners are pleasant and helpful, ammenties are immaculate. Had a great stay and will be back. My perfect place.

Second time there and again received a lovely service at reception, found the amenities very clean and really enjoyed my stay. Having a quiet beach in such a short distance is amazing! The only thing I'd say that could be improved is to have the tent sites with more shade on it :)
Awesome spot, great camping and cabins. Right on the beach.

Plenty of play areas for the kids.
Two pools and of course the ocean 👍

The team at Sapphire beach sqeezed us into an unpowered site with no notice. The spot was great.

Whole park is well maintained, clean and super inviting.

There is everything you need in this park, even its own beach access! Amenities are fantastic, something for everyone.
Staff were equally as fantastic!

Will definitely be coming back and also reccomending to friends and family!

Beautiful location less than a minute walk from an absolutely gorgeous beach.

Staff are friendly and accommodating, facilities are very new and clean.

We were only passing through on the way to another park and needed a place to stay the night. We loved it so much we ended up staying an extra day
Was full but would definitely try and book here. Great facilities and friendly, helpful staff. BBQ, pool, play ground areas. Really tranquil surrounds.

We had overnight stays whilst heading north and returning to Sydney.  Both times different cabins but the cleanliness and comfort were excellent.  A great place for a longer stay with lots of activites and the beach.

Gorgeous little spot.
Staff & maintenance guys are all lovely. Upgrades happening at the moment to bits and pieces around the park.
Easy beautiful beach access and dog friendly.
Some really nice permanent residents.
Great park. Very beautiful . Good layout esey to park your caravan . Good clean shows great place for kids. And a beautiful beach you can walk on  very tropical .happy campers.👍
Caravan Powered site. Efficiently run quiet little caravan park. We'll be back. Stef Beachstone Cafe walking distance😋
The location was perfect next to the beach close to so many places and overall great experience

Can't comment on the cabins but the park itself is nice. Very quiet and so close to the beach. The bathrooms are newly renovated with showers of good size and are hot. The separate family bathroom was very handy though the bath/basin is only big enough for one child. The camp kitchen is very clean with everything you need to cook up a feast!
My only gripe is that the pools are very cold and deeper than it says it is. Both are over 2m deep but say 1.4m and 1.8m. And the mini golf is pay to play 👎

Fantastic  location, friendly service, great beach access, quiet and secluded but close to everything. Awesome shower and kitchenette had everything we needed. Only complaint is bed was a little hard but who doesn't miss their own bed right! Loved our short stay. Thank you 😊
Beautiful park. Large spacious cabin. Full kitchen. Full fridge. Right on a beautiful beach. Highly recommend for a quiet idyllic getaway.
Nestled within an exotic location, friendly management and staff, great service
Spotless Park on beach. Lots amenities. New bathrooms. Staff welcoming. Very quiet and dog friendly

Lovely holiday park, right next to the beach (beautiful beach btw), lots of shady tree-lined caravan sites, a range of large cabins. Some great walks nearby, including the beach.

In the process of renovating their amenities, so not a lot of toilets and showers, but that'll be good again when the work is done.

Stayed here for a get together with my extended family for a weekend . Firstly Sapphire beach is a lovely beach and the park is basically on it. The park has alot of facilities like a games room and putt putt golf but these are pay to play ,the pool and BBQ area is free  . The cabins were nice and clean and beds comfortable but very close to each other and it looks like quite a few permanent residents scattered amongst the rental cabins. Also maybe a 3rd world problem but the gravel on the roads and around cabins is sharp and hard to walk bear feet on so fongs have to be worn every where. Another thing that we became aware of which was alittle annoying but may be necessary was there are alot of rules and surveillance cameras around that seemed to be in favour for the residents.
Stayed for 11 days with our caravan top spot
The noise from highway continues all night Facilities very good Right on beach
Beautiful and quiet spot right on the beach. Friendly staff. New amenities and well presented. So close to Coffs but you wouldn't know it. Very relaxing.
Cosy little park, enjoyed our stay. Clean and new amenities.
